subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto our Lord Who, in the midst of tribulation, summoned all creation unto His most exalted horizon and manifested through His bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لربنا الذی فی بحبوحه البلاء دعا الخلق الی افقه الاعلی و اظهر بجوده
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution
